mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ExamDsblReqDAO.listStdByDsblReq 설 명 : 장애 시험 지원 미등록 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.STD_ID AS stdId , A.SBJCT_ID AS crsCreCd , A.USER_ID AS userId , IFNULL((SELECT TKEXAM_MNTS FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AS AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN AS BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' WHERE BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M'), 0) AS midStareTm , IFNULL((SELECT TKEXAM_MNTS FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AS AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN AS BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' WHERE BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L'), 0) AS endStareTm , CASE B.MN_DSBL_CD WHEN '03' THEN CASE B.MN_DSBL_GRDCD WHEN '01' THEN 1 WHEN '02' THEN 0.7 WHEN '03' or '04' THEN 0.5 ELSE 0.25 END ELSE CASE B.MN_DSBL_GRDCD WHEN '01' or '02' or '03' THEN 0.5 ELSE 0.25 END END AS stareTmTimes FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AS A JOIN TB_LMS_USR AS B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.STD_ID NOT IN (SELECT AA.STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_SPRT_APLY AS AA JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AS BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD ='S' WHERE BB.USER_ID = #{userId}) AND A.SBJCT_ID IN (SELECT DISTINCT AA.SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN AS AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AS BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AS CC ON AA.SBJCT_ID = CC.SBJCT_ID AND CC.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' WHERE BB.EXAM_CTGRCD ='EXAM' AND BB.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND BB.TKEXAM_TYCD IN ('M', 'L') AND CC.USER_ID = #{userId})
